title: polemonium boreale subsp. nudipedum
intro: Polemonium boreale subsp. nudipedum, commonly known as sky pilot, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues and soothe irritated skin. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, ease coughs, and provide relief from colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Polemonium boreale subsp. nudipedum often include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its therapeutic properties.
